title: Mellow Crispy Greek Feta Fritters
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Greek dish featuring crispy fritters with a bitter taste, perfect for a lazy Sunday, served in a cazuela. The dish is made with chilled butter and deep-fried to a golden brown.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add the crumbled feta cheese, grated butter, eggs, milk, and chopped parsley to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 10 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot in a cazuela and enjoy.
Repeat the frying process until all the dough is used up.
